meaning: adj.不能受惩罚的 不该受处罚的
examples: If the error is a matter of opinion and unpunishable, so much the better—an apology then becomes a gracious and creditable occasion, and an example to all.
If the error is a matter of opinion and unpunishable, so much the better —an apology then becomes a gracious and creditable occasion, and an example to all.
